subject: Human Resources
title: People Analytics
description: A fast breakdown of People Analytics for builders.

hook.text: Google discovered the ideal manager has exactly eight behaviors—using data, not intuition.

buildup.text: People analytics uses data for evidence-based HR decisions—hiring, retention, engagement, compensation, and org design.

discovery.text: Predictive models forecast attrition, identify high-potential staff, and measure training ROI—with data, not gut feelings.

twist.text: Data without context is dangerous—a model flagging a team as 'high risk' may reflect a hot market, not poor management.

climax.text: The best people analytics teams combine quantitative rigor with human understanding—numbers inform, but people still decide.

punchline.text: Data tells you what's happening. Humans figure out why and what to do about it.

quiz.question: What is people analytics?
options: Using data to make evidence-based HR decisions
